category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Mozambique INNOQ market-access, NM/IEC standards, and energy labelling requirements.

title.en: China-to-Mozambique Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入莫桑比克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入莫三比克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Mozambique market-access requirements administered by INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade), including NM/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standards, energy labelling, R-600a refrigerant handling, and Portuguese-language documentation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与莫桑比克市场准入要求对照，准入由INNOQ（国家标准化与质量研究所）管理，涵盖NM/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、能效标识、R-600a制冷剂处理及葡萄牙语文件要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與莫三比克市場准入要求對照，准入由INNOQ（國家標準化與品質研究所）管理，涵蓋NM/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、能效標識、R-600a製冷劑處理及葡萄牙語文件要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Mozambique legislation, INNOQ conformity-assessment and import-inspection procedures, adopted NM/IEC standards, energy-labelling rules, and Portuguese-language documentation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行莫桑比克法律、INNOQ合格评定与进口检验程序、所采纳的NM/IEC标准、能效标识规则及葡萄牙语文件要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行莫三比克法律、INNOQ合格評定與進口檢驗程序、所採納的NM/IEC標準、能效標識規則及葡萄牙語文件要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Mozambique market-access gaps: (1) electrical safety must be demonstrated against NM/IEC 60335-2-24 (Mozambique adopts IEC via INNOQ NM standards) — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically recognised; (2) an in-country importer of record is required and import consignments may be subject to INNOQ conformity assessment / import inspection for regulated products; (3) energy labelling / MEPS programmes for refrigerators are emerging and should be verified before shipment; (4) Portuguese-language product documentation, instructions, and markings are required. R-600a refrigerant aligns with IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant practice, but charge documentation must be verified. The China-Mozambique grid is closely aligned (both 50 Hz; Mozambique 220 V single-phase nominal), which simplifies electrical adaptation versus markets with different frequency.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临数项莫桑比克市场准入差距：（1）电气安全须依据NM/IEC 60335-2-24证明（莫桑比克通过INNOQ的NM标准采纳IEC）——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动承认；（2）须有在地进口商作为进口记录方，且进口货物对受监管产品可能须经INNOQ合格评定/进口检验；（3）针对电冰箱的能效标识/最低能效（MEPS）方案正在形成中，出货前应核实；（4）须提供葡萄牙语产品文件、说明书及标识。R-600a制冷剂与IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂规范一致，但充注量文件须核实。中莫电网高度接近（同为50 Hz；莫桑比克220 V单相额定），相较于频率不同的市场简化了电气适配。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨數項莫三比克市場准入差距：（1）電氣安全須依據NM/IEC 60335-2-24證明（莫三比克透過INNOQ的NM標準採納IEC）——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動承認；（2）須有在地進口商作為進口記錄方，且進口貨物對受監管產品可能須經INNOQ合格評定/進口檢驗；（3）針對電冰箱的能效標識/最低能效（MEPS）方案正在形成中，出貨前應核實；（4）須提供葡萄牙語產品文件、說明書及標識。R-600a製冷劑與IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑規範一致，但充注量文件須核實。中莫電網高度接近（同為50 Hz；莫三比克220 V單相額定），相較於頻率不同的市場簡化了電氣適配。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; INNOQ, INCM, and Mozambique government gazette (Boletim da Republica) are the canonical sources for Mozambique requirements.
